title: Pirate Personality
description: Pirates have high corruption but extreme effectiveness in their specialties. They don't follow normal organizational rules. Managing pirates requires understanding their motivations and accepting their downsides.
definition-of-done: Pirate character traits defined. High corruption stat baseline. Specialty effectiveness bonuses. Rule-breaking behavior modeling.
testing-plan: Verify pirate traits generate. Test corruption baseline. Verify specialty bonuses. Test rule-breaking effects.
